title: St Peter's CofE Primary School (Cleethorpes): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: St Peter’s CofE Primary School  URN: 143281  Notice issued to: Lincoln Anglican Academy Trust  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Alison Wilson  DfE regional director office: Yorkshire and the Humber  Local authority: North East Lincolnshire Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
